name: codex-media-canvas
description: A Codex-driven media canvas for image and video generation/editing from whiteboard selection, frames, and annotations.

interface.shortDescription: Open a canvas, generate or edit images/videos from frames and annotations, and write results back with lineage.
interface.longDescription: Codex Media Canvas keeps the whiteboard as visual context and writeback surface. Codex skills decide image/video generation modes, call real providers, and insert results back onto the canvas.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image on the canvas.
Edit the selected image according to the frame annotations.
Generate a video from the selected frame or prompt.
